assertions.assertion: Explains that SLO uses front-channel logout via iframes (not redirect chains)
assertions.rationale: The iframe-based approach is Duende-specific; general SAML knowledge would describe redirect-based SLO.

assertions.assertion: Shows SingleLogoutServiceUrls configuration with SamlEndpointType and SamlBinding.HttpRedirect
Mentions that partial logout is normal/expected when some SPs don't respond
assertions.rationale: General SAML knowledge would acknowledge that SLO can be unreliable.
ISamlLogoutSessionStore is Duende-specific and not general knowledge.
